positive: A majestic, intricate bioluminescent fauna and flora design, featuring a mythical griffin nested within oversized glowing mandalas of exotic flowers. The style is a highly detailed, ornamental zentangle and stained-glass vector illustration, rendered in deep midnight teal, electric sapphire, and glowing chartreuse accents. Focus on clean, thick black outlines and strong, contrasting silhouettes. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and highly impactful, suitable for textile printing. Minimal background detail, maximizing the central motif's readability.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, deformed, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, gradients, monochrome, photorealism, realistic photo, logos, copyright, letters
